description_long: This object is a classic upright candle set in a sturdy, metallic candlestick holder. The candle itself is tall, cylindrical, and white, with a slightly uneven top and a visible wick at the center. The holder is made of brass or a similar metal, featuring a wide, round base for stability and a tapered stem that flares out at the bottom. Decorative grooves encircle the upper part of the holder, adding a touch of elegance. The surface of the holder has a slightly aged, matte finish with some visible scuff marks. This type of candle and holder is commonly found on tables, mantels, or as part of outdoor urban decor for ambient lighting.
description: A tall white candle with a visible wick sits in a brass candlestick holder with a wide, round base and decorative grooves. The holder has a matte, slightly aged finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the candle's full height and the wide, round brass base with decorative grooves clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth taper of the holder and the candle's upright position, with the grooves and base still prominent.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 1, with the candle and holder's proportions and details consistent, but the grooves appear slightly less pronounced.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the candle and holder, with the same decorative grooves and base visible, and minor surface scuffs more apparent.
